diagrams.title: Classification of Input Devices
diagrams.description: Shows the main categories of input devices with examples
elements: Scanning Devices (Scanner, OCR, OMR, Barcode Reader)
Digital Input Devices (Digital Camera, Video Capture)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the broad categorization and relationships between different input device types

diagrams.title: Keyboard Layout and Key Types
diagrams.description: Standard 104-key keyboard showing different key sections
elements: Special Keys (Ctrl, Alt, Shift, Enter, Backspace)
diagrams.purpose: Learn keyboard structure and key categories for data entry operations

diagrams.title: Barcode Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a typical barcode with labeled parts
diagrams.purpose: Understand barcode composition and how readers decode the information

diagrams.title: Mouse Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of mechanical vs optical mouse internals
elements: Comparison points: Accuracy, Maintenance, Surface compatibility
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between mouse technologies and their working principles
